name: eucalyptus
description: Turn Excel workbooks into API-backed Eucalyptus calculation models through MCP upload, IO discovery, compile, playground, and saved-test workflows.

interface.longDescription: Install Eucalyptus workflows for uploading Excel workbooks, discovering IN_/OUT_ cells, compiling confirmed model IO, running playground calculations, creating and running saved tests, setting API destination defaults, and reading logs or metrics.
defaultPrompt: Use Eucalyptus to list my Excel-backed API models and summarize the available compiled versions.
Use Eucalyptus to upload this workbook, discover IO cells, ask me to confirm them, then compile a new API model version.
